about: PromptGuard MCP security benchmark. A reproducible, local corpus of MCP attack cases and benign controls. Inspired by AgentDojo (arXiv:2406.13352), which models prompt-injection defenses as evaluable data. Malicious cases must be detected; benign controls must NOT trigger findings at or above medium. Contributions welcome.
